message:
Add docs map generation script

Introduces a script to generate a hierarchical documentation map
(tenzir_docs_map.md) from the sidebar configuration. The map includes
all documentation pages with their H2/H3 headings for non-reference
content, enabling AI agents to navigate the documentation structure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,5 +14,8 @@ src/content/docs/changelog/*
 src/sidebar-changelog.generated.ts
 src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
 
+# Docs map (generated in CI)
+public/tenzir_docs_map.md
+
 # Logs
 dev.log

@@ -18,7 +18,8 @@
     "lint:prettier": "prettier --check .",
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write .",
     "build:linkcheck": "CHECK_LINKS=true pnpm build",
-    "build:full": "CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build",
+    "build:full": "pnpm generate:docs-map && CHECK_LINKS=true LLMS_TXT=true pnpm build",
+    "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs-map.mjs",
     "lint:fix": "pnpm run lint:markdown:fix && pnpm run lint:eslint:fix && pnpm run lint:prettier:fix",
     "postinstall": "node scripts/fix-starlight-llms-txt.js"
   },
